title: Auto loans and financing | Wells Fargo

sections.name: Hero/Marquee
sections.style: dark (red brand color background with image)
sections.overview: Full-width hero banner with car/family photo and text overlay with CTA

sequences.description: Full-width banner with background image of family with car, heading 'The easy way to manage your auto loan', supporting text about account setup, and a 'Get started' call-to-action button

sections.name: Benefits
sections.overview: Three icon-based feature cards highlighting auto financing benefits

sequences.description: Centered heading 'Benefits of Wells Fargo auto financing'
Grid of 3 items, each with a small circular icon, heading, and short description text (Nationwide network, Convenience, Peace of mind)

sections.name: Mobile App Promo
sections.overview: App promotion section with phone mockup image and app store download links

sequences.description: Two-column layout: left side has phone mockup image showing app screen; right side has heading 'Banking where and when you need it', description text about account access, and Apple/Google app store download badges

sections.name: Auto Loan Journey Cards
sections.overview: Three promotional cards with images showing different loan journey stages

sequences.description: Centered heading 'Wherever you are in your auto loan journey, we're here for you'
Grid of 3 cards, each with a large landscape image, bold title, description text, and a text link CTA (Learn about auto financing, Explore payment options, Get help with payments)

sections.name: FAQ
sections.overview: Expandable FAQ section with questions and answers

sequences.description: Centered heading 'Answers to auto loan questions'
Four expandable question-answer pairs about auto loan topics (applying, managing online, paper statements, payment due date)
Centered secondary button 'Review all FAQs' linking to full FAQ page

sections.name: Customer Support
sections.overview: Three support option cards with icons and contact info

sequences.description: Grid of 3 items, each with a circular icon, heading, description text, and a CTA link (Ask Fargo with 'Meet Fargo' link, Financial Health with 'Learn more' link, Call us with phone number and hours)

excludedElements: Exit modals (App Store/Google Play leaving site warnings)
Footnotes section (will be handled as metadata or separate fragment)
